calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Report On Placement
Off Calendar Jan-13-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Aleeta Van Runkle (City Attorney) for the San Francisco General Hospital.

The Court stated that this was a 3200 petition, that it was in receipt of Ms. Van Runkle's status report, and that pursuant to the report that the matter could go off calendar. Ms. Van Runkle stated that the patient is taking his medications and is doing better.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Court Investigator: Jeanine Lim. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
